ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., Tree) */,
  "node_count" INTEGER /* Number of nodes present in the graph */,
  "graph_density" REAL /* Density of the graph represented as a float */,
  "user_model_lambda" REAL /* Parameter representing user model behavior */,
  "graph_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph type associated with the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_graph_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_type_id") REFERENCES graph_types ("graph_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the simulation */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance factor used in the simulation */,
  "prob_select_unknown" REAL /* Probability of selecting an unknown option */,
  "prob_return_first" REAL /* Probability of returning the first result */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, running, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation associated with the operation */,
  "operation_count" INTEGER /* Count of operations performed in the simulation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., node insertion, edge deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_simulations" (
  "user_sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-simulation association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being run by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the simulation (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation related to the metric */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the simulation in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Rate of success of the simulation as a percentage */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Rate of errors in the simulation as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_types" (
  "graph_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the graph type (e.g., Tree, Directed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the graph type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation related to the settings */,
  "max_iterations" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations for the simulation */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level for the simulation execution */,
  "lambda_value" REAL /* Value of lambda for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_settings_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., optimization, recommendation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_tags_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., simulation completed, error occurred) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
